title: Article
description: A financial news article enriched with AI-driven sentiment analysis and company entity extraction

publishDate.description: Date and time when the article was published

sentiment.description: AI-generated sentiment classification for the article

confidence.description: Confidence score for the sentiment classification (0.0 to 1.0)

summary.description: AI-generated brief summary of the article

images.description: URLs of images associated with the article

companies.description: Companies mentioned and extracted from the article

createdAt.description: Timestamp when Finlight ingested the article

revisedDate.description: Timestamp when the article was last revised by the publisher

isUpdate.description: Whether this article is an update to a previously published piece

categories.description: Content categories assigned to the article

countries.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes relevant to the article
